name: @nzmedet/feas
description: Local release automation for Expo and React Native apps.

scripts.test: pnpm --filter feas-db build && pnpm --filter feas-core build && pnpm --filter feas-api build && pnpm --filter feas-cli build && node --test tests/smoke/*.test.mjs tests/integration/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter feas-db build && pnpm --filter feas-core build && pnpm --filter feas-api build && pnpm --filter feas-cli build && node --test tests/integration/*.test.mjs
